subject: Re: Fwd: RE: Comments - Agreement

I thought the lawyers were handling,, I'll check today

--- Mohan Murjani mmurjani@murjanigroup.com wrote:

your side .... Even if you have changed your mind
and decided not to invest, I would be grateful for a
response .... Rgds .... Mohan
